questions: Should the header thumbnail strip (VideoGenerationModalHeader lines 43-58) be removed now that the top collapsible section shows the same images? Or should the header keep its current thumbnails as a persistent preview?

For the ShotImagesEditor in the top section — should it show the EditorHeader (with the 'Guidance' title)? Or should we hide it since the CollapsibleSection already provides a header? The readOnly mode hides editing controls but still shows the header bar.
When both sections are collapsed, the modal body will be very short (just two summary bars). Should there be a minimum height, or is compact OK?
The collapsed 'Generation Settings' summary shows model/frames/prompt — should it also show motion mode (basic/advanced) or LoRA count if any are selected?

success_criteria.criterion: Modal renders two independently collapsible sections: 'Shot Images' (top) and 'Generation Settings' (bottom)
Top section shows ShotImagesEditor in readOnly batch mode when expanded
Bottom section shows BatchSettingsForm + MotionControl when expanded (identical to current form)
Each section shows a compact summary when collapsed (top: thumbnails + count; bottom: model/frames/prompt)
Generate button stays in always-visible footer regardless of section collapse state
Current VideoShotDisplay.tsx usage maintains current behavior (top closed, bottom open)
VideoGenerationModalProps accepts defaultTopOpen and defaultBottomOpen props
ShotImagesEditor in top section has no editing controls (mode switcher hidden, no drag/drop, no delete)
No changes to shared CollapsibleSection component
ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid wrapper isolates ShotImagesEditor prop boilerplate from layout code
Collapsed summaries update reactively when settings change (e.g., changing model while bottom is temporarily collapsed)
Smooth collapse/expand animation consistent with existing CollapsibleSection behavior
Manual smoke test: open modal, toggle both sections, generate video successfully

assumptions: The existing CollapsibleSection component will NOT be modified — we'll use controlled mode + render summaries externally to show collapsed content.
ShotImagesEditor's readOnly + preloadedImages mode is stable and renders correctly without edit callbacks being functional (no-ops are safe).
The collapsed summary for 'Generation Settings' will show: model display name, frame count, and first ~60 chars of the prompt. This can be adjusted after visual review.

The header (VideoGenerationModalHeader) will be kept as-is for now — it serves as a persistent shot name + navigation element. The thumbnail strip in the header is redundant with the collapsible top section but provides a quick glance regardless of section state.
ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid will use columns=4 as a reasonable default for a 1000px-wide modal.
effectiveAspectRatio is already computed in the controller but not returned — exposing it is safe with no side effects.
